title: Welcome to Roblox
description: welcome to roblox is a recreation of classic minecraft and 2006 roblox!
body:
🌐 Welcome to Roblox – A Classic Throwback to 2006!
Mod Version: Classic Edition
Minecraft Version: newsest version
Author: kalebjeter13

Step back in time and relive the golden age of online creativity.
"Welcome to Roblox" is a passion project mod that faithfully recreates the feel, look, and charm of 2006-era Roblox—right inside your Minecraft world!

📦 Features:
🧱 Classic Roblox Bricks & Parts

Build using old-school studs, rounded bricks, and classic plastic textures

Authentic materials like "Slate", "Plastic", and "Studded" blocks

👾 Retro GUIs & Menus

Interfaces inspired by early Roblox Studio

Classic loading screens and sound effects from the 2006 era

🧍‍♂️ Avatar Nostalgia

Play as the iconic blocky avatars—yellow heads, brick torsos, and all

Customize your look with classic hats, faces, and gear!

🎮 Interactive Places

Explore nostalgic game modes like Obbies, Brickbattle maps, and Tycoon-style mechanics

Modded redstone logic mimicking Roblox scripting tools from the past

🎵 Original Soundset

Classic Roblox UI sounds, music cues, and building ambiance reimagined for Minecraft

🎯 Why This Mod?
Whether you grew up building in Roblox circa 2006 or are curious about its origins, "Welcome to Roblox" lets you fuse two iconic sandbox worlds into one unforgettable experience. Built for classic Minecraft fans and Roblox veterans alike! 

BTW most stuff isn't here yet because, it's a alpha.
